D4 Colorimetry L5 Evaluate Reference

Jz vs L* Across HDR

trace lightness from 0.1 to 10000 cd/m² and watch CIELAB's L* flatten at the top while Jzazbz keeps spreading

CIELAB's L* was fit for reflective prints near 100 cd/m². Push to HDR luminances and its cube root compresses the bright end into almost no difference. Jzazbz is built on the PQ curve, so its lightness Jz stays perceptually even across the full HDR range.

Slide the luminance of a neutral grey across four orders of magnitude. Both lightness curves are normalised to 1.0 at 10000 cd/m². Watch how little L* moves between 1000 and 10000 cd/m² compared with Jz.
